SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminBrowseEventsActivity
This class deals with the browsing of all events for admins
AdminBrowseEventsActivityTest
 
AdminEventDetailsActivity
This class deals with displaying the event details page for the admins, which will allow admins to delete an event
AdminEventDetailsActivityTest
 
AdminZoneActivity
This class deals with the Admin Zone page
AdminZoneActivityTest
 
AllEntrantsActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_all_entrants screen this is the activity that shows the Organizer all entrants of a given Status
AllEntrantsActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the AllEntrantsActivity this is the activity that shows the Organizer all entrants of a given Status
AuthMenuActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_auth_menu screen it is the stating activity of the app if user was not automatically signed it lets the user navigate to the signup and login activities
AuthSessionPreference
This is a class stores authentication preference on the device (if user should be remembered)
CaptureActivity
Custom activity for the QR code scanner interface
CreateEventActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_create_event screen this activity allows users to create events that will be added to the database is also used to edit an event by populating the input view with Event data
CreateEventActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the CreateEventActivity this activity allows an organiser to create a new event or edit one that already exists it also verifies that event data is saved correctly in the database
EntrantAdapter
This is a class that converts a list of Entrants into a displayable format
EntrantInfo
This is a class that Contains Entrant Name and ID stored in an event
EntrantsActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_entrants screen it allows organiser to navigate to view lists of entrants it also can notify entrants and manages acceptance of entrants
EntrantsActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the EntrantActivity it allows organiser to navigate to view lists of entrants it also can notify entrants and manages acceptance of entrants
EventItem
Event class that is a container for all information related to an event
EventListAdapter
This is a class that converts a list of Events into a displayable format
EventRepository
The Class the manages the interactions between Event as a object in the program and as a document in the database
EventRepositoryMathTest
Local unit tests for the logic used during the lottery draw.
EventRepositoryTest
Unit tests for helper logic in EventRepository.
ExampleInstrumentedTest
Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
ExampleUnitTest
Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
HomeActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_home screen it is the starting Activity of normal users and shows a list of current event the user is able to navigate to the other sections of the app through this activity
HomeActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the HomeActivity it is the starting Activity of normal users and shows a list of current event the user is able to navigate to the other sections of the app through this activity
HostedEventsActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_hosted_events screen this displays all the event the user has created allows navigation to create a new event and to events the user has hosted
HostedEventsActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the HostedEventsActivity this activity displays all of the events that the current user has created it also allows navigation to create a new event or open an existing one
LoginActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_login screen it allows the user to put in credentials to login their account
LoginActivityTest
Tests the functionality of LoginActivity
MainActivity
This is a class that is the controller which screen the user should start on if the user is found immediately log them in otherwise move them to authentication
MyThingsActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_my_things screen this is the activity that allows navigation to modify profile, events, waitlist also shows notifications that have been received
MyWaitlistActivity
screen where the entrant can view waitlist and invitation * statuses This is a class that is the controller of the activity_my_waitlist screen It is the activity that allows users to see the list of events they have signed up for
MyWaitlistActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the MyWaitlistActivity this activity shows the events that the current user is signed up to it also allows navigation from a waitlist entry into the event details screen
NotificationAdapter
Adapter for displaying a list of NotificationItem objects in a RecyclerView.
NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder
ViewHolder class for individual notification list items
NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
Interface for handling click and long-click events on notification items.
NotificationAdapterCountTest
Local unit tests for the NotificationAdapter class.
NotificationItem
Model class representing a notification item in the system Notifications can be related to winning a lottery ("WIN") or general event updates ("GENERAL")
NotificationItemTest
Local unit tests for the NotificationItem data model.
NotificationRepository
Repository class for managing notifications in Firestore.
NotificationRepositoryTest
Unit tests for NotificationRepository.
ProfileRemovedActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_profile_removed screen this activity is launch when a user is logged into a deleted account
QRCode
The class responsible for create a unique QR code for an event
QRCodeTest
Test the functionality of QRCode This activity generate a unique QRCode that linked to specific event
SettingsActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_settings screen this is the activity that allows a user to change their preference settings(when implemented) and account information allows a user to create an account and then navigates them to home activity also is where the user can delete their account
SettingsActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the SettingsActivity this activity allows a signed-in user to update their profile information
SignupActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_signup screen allows a user to create an account and then navigates them to home activity
SignupActivityTest
Tests the functionality of SignupActivity this activity allows an entrant to provide profile information and create an account
UserProfile
This class represents a Users profile and has all the getters and setters associated with all of the necessary fields for each user.
UserProfileDetailsActivity
This class deals with displaying the user details page for the admins, which will allow admins to delete an event
UserProfileDetailsActivityTest
 
UserProfilesActivity
This class deals with the browsing of all users for admins
UserProfilesActivityTest
 
UserProfileTest
 
ViewEventActivity
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_view_event screen this is the activity that shows event Information to Entrants It has the controllers that let the Entrant signup/leave the waitlist
ViewEventActivityTest
Tests the functionality of the ViewEventActivity this is the activity that shows event Information to Entrants It has the controllers that let the Entrant signup/leave the waitlist
WaitlistEntryAdapter
This is a class converts the list of Events that a User has into a displayable format
WaitlistEntryItem
This is a class that represents and event that a User is on a Waitlist for
